rulings.Case Title: J&M LAND RESTORATION, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of J&M Land Restoration, Inc.'S In Support Of Verified Petition To Confirm Arbitraation Award; Copeland Declaration
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, FEBRUARY 9, 2007, LINE 15. PLAINTIFF J & M LAND RESTORATION, INC.'S Motion In Support Of Verified Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award: THE COURT, SUA SPONTE, CONSOLIDATED THIS CASE WITH CASE NUMBER 506861 AND DESIGNATES CASE NUMBER 506876 AS THE LEAD CASE. MOTION TO CONFIRM AND MOTION TO VACATE TO BE HEARD ON MARCH 19, 2007. MOTION TO VACATE TO BE FILED AND SERVED ON FEBRUARY 26, 2007. OPPOSITION IS DUE ON MARCH 8, 2007. REPLY IS DUE ON MARCH 14, 2007. =(302/PJM/PB)
